title: Stronger Snowballs
body:
This mod aims to make snowballs stronger by giving them additional functionality.

Current features include

  • Being hit by a snowball will give a short slowness debuff.
  • Fiery mobs such as Magma Cubes and Blazes will take damage when hit by a snowball.

Like the mod and want to support me?

  • Follow me on Twitter
  • Join my Discord
